steps.title: Convert percentages to decimal form
steps.content: 2,136% = 21.36 and 89% = 0.89. The given conditions are: $$a = 21.36(b + c)$$ and $$b = 0.89c$$

steps.title: Express both variables in terms of a single variable
steps.content: Since $b = 0.89c$, we have $b + c = 0.89c + c = 1.89c$. Substitute into the equation for $a$: $$a = 21.36(1.89c)$$ Multiply: $21.36 \times 1.89 = 40.3704$, so $$a = 40.3704c$$

steps.title: Find what percent of b is a
steps.content: The ratio is $$\frac{a}{b} = \frac{40.3704c}{0.89c} = \frac{40.3704}{0.89} = 45.36$$ Convert to percentage: $45.36 \times 100\% = 4536\%$. A is correct.
